system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_tonghop_xuat_hopchat_amount2","body":"CREATE   PROC [dbo].[TR_TONGHOP_XUAT_HOPCHAT_AMOUNT2](@madonhang nvarchar(max))
AS
BEGIN
-- LẤY THÔNG TIN XUẤT HỖN HỢP
SELECT @madonhang AS madonhang, B.buocson, SUM(B.soluong) AS soluong_xuat 
INTO #HONHOP_XUAT
FROM tr_tonghop_xuat_hopchat_chitiet B
WHERE madonhang IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM([value])) FROM dbo.fn_Split(@madonhang, ','))
GROUP BY B.buocson


-- THÔNG TIN ĐƠN HÀNG THEO NGÀY XUẤT HỖN HỢP
SELECT @madonhang AS order_number, B.item_number, C.mausac, SUM(D.SOLUONG) AS soluong_donhang
INTO #DONHANG
FROM tr_order A
	INNER JOIN tr_order_detail B ON A.order_number = B.order_number
	INNER JOIN tr_sanpham C ON B.item_number = C.masp
	INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM tr_thongke_soluong WHERE BOPHAN = 'SON') D ON B.order_number = D.MADONHANG AND B.item_number = D.MASP
WHERE A.f_cancelled = 'N' AND B.f_cancelled = 'N'
	AND A.order_number IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM([value])) FROM dbo.fn_Split(@madonhang, ','))
	AND ISNULL(B.khongtinhson, 0) = 0
GROUP BY B.item_number, C.mausac

-- định lượng sơn
SELECT madonhang = C.order_number, C.mausac, 
	A.buoc, A.mact, A.matson,
	khoiluong = SUM(A.soluong)
INTO #DINHMUC_SON3
FROM tr_dinhmuc_son3 A
	INNER JOIN #DONHANG C ON A.masp = C.item_number
	INNER JOIN tr_material D ON A.mact = D.mavt
GROUP BY C.order_number, C.mausac, A.buoc, A.mact, A.matson

-- mét vuông sơn
SELECT madonhang = C.order_number, C.mausac, A.matson,
	metvuong1 = sum(distinct a.metvuong),
	metvuong = SUM(A.metvuong * C.soluong_donhang) 
INTO #METVUONG_SON3
FROM tr_dinhmuc_son3_metvuong A
	INNER JOIN #DONHANG C ON A.masp = C.item_number
WHERE A.metvuong > 0
GROUP BY C.order_number, C.mausac, A.matson

-- table[0]: danh sách phân bổ số lượng theo hỗn hợp xuất
SELECT a.madonhang, a.mausac, A.mact, C.mota, A.buoc, E.ten AS matson, 
	khoiluong = SUM(B.soluong_xuat * phantram),
	dongia = SUM(B.soluong_xuat * phantram * c.dongia)
FROM (
	SELECT A.madonhang, A.mausac, A.buoc, A.mact, A.matson, A.khoiluong,
		phantram = CASE WHEN SUM(a.khoiluong) OVER (PARTITION BY a.madonhang, a.buoc) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE a.khoiluong / SUM(a.khoiluong) OVER (PARTITION BY a.madonhang, a.buoc) END
	FROM #DINHMUC_SON3 A
) A INNER JOIN #HONHOP_XUAT B ON A.madonhang = B.madonhang AND A.buoc = B.buocson
	INNER JOIN tr_material C ON A.mact = C.mavt
	INNER JOIN #METVUONG_SON3 D ON A.madonhang = D.madonhang AND A.mausac = D.mausac AND A.matson = D.matson
	LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM tr_common WHERE phanloai = 5) E ON A.matson = E.ma
GROUP BY a.madonhang, a.mausac, A.mact, C.mota, A.buoc, e.ten
ORDER BY A.madonhang, a.mausac, e.ten

-- table[1]: tính số tiền sơn trên một mét vuông 2024.10.09
--SELECT a.madonhang, a.mausac, E.ten AS matson, 
--	dongia = SUM(B.soluong_xuat * phantram * c.dongia),
--    tongsoluong = SUM(B.soluong_xuat * phantram),
--	metvuong = SUM(DISTINCT D.metvuong),
--	dongiametvuong =  SUM(B.soluong_xuat * phantram * c.dongia) / SUM(DISTINCT D.metvuong),
--    soluongtrenmetvuong = IIF(SUM(DISTINCT D.metvuong) = 0, 0, SUM(B.soluong_xuat * phantram) / SUM(DISTINCT D.metvuong))
--FROM (
--	SELECT A.madonhang, A.mausac, A.buoc, A.mact, A.matson, A.khoiluong,
--		phantram = CASE WHEN SUM(a.khoiluong) OVER (PARTITION BY a.madonhang, a.buoc) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE a.khoiluong / SUM(a.khoiluong) OVER (PARTITION BY a.madonhang, a.buoc) END
--	FROM #DINHMUC_SON3 A
--) A INNER JOIN #HONHOP_XUAT B ON A.madonhang = B.madonhang AND A.buoc = B.buocson
--	INNER JOIN tr_material C ON A.mact = C.mavt
--	INNER JOIN #METVUONG_SON3 D ON A.madonhang = D.madonhang AND A.mausac = D.mausac AND A.matson = D.matson
--	LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM tr_common WHERE phanloai = 5) E ON A.matson = E.ma
--GROUP BY a.madonhang, a.mausac, e.ten
--ORDER BY A.madonhang, a.mausac, e.ten

SELECT madonhang = @madonhang, a.mausac, E.ten AS matson, 
	dongia = SUM(B.soluong_xuat * phantram * c.dongia),
    tongsoluong = SUM(B.soluong_xuat * phantram),
	metvuong = SUM(DISTINCT D.metvuong),
	dongiametvuong =  SUM(B.soluong_xuat * phantram * c.dongia) / SUM(DISTINCT D.metvuong),
    soluongtrenmetvuong = IIF(SUM(DISTINCT D.metvuong) = 0, 0, SUM(B.soluong_xuat * phantram) / SUM(DISTINCT D.metvuong))
FROM (
	SELECT A.madonhang, A.mausac, A.buoc, A.mact, A.matson, A.khoiluong,
		phantram = CASE WHEN SUM(a.khoiluong) OVER (PARTITION BY a.madonhang, a.buoc) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE a.khoiluong / SUM(a.khoiluong) OVER (PARTITION BY a.madonhang, a.buoc) END
	FROM #DINHMUC_SON3 A
) A INNER JOIN #HONHOP_XUAT B ON A.madonhang = B.madonhang AND A.buoc = B.buocson
	INNER JOIN tr_material C ON A.mact = C.mavt
	INNER JOIN #METVUONG_SON3 D ON A.madonhang = D.madonhang AND A.mausac = D.mausac AND A.matson = D.matson
	LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM tr_common WHERE phanloai = 5) E ON A.matson = E.ma
GROUP BY a.mausac, e.ten
ORDER BY a.mausac, e.ten

DROP TABLE #DONHANG, #HONHOP_XUAT, #DINHMUC_SON3, #METVUONG_SON3;
END","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.fn_split","dbo.tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son3","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son3_metvuong","dbo.tr_material","dbo.tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_thongke_soluong","dbo.tr_tonghop_xuat_hopchat_chitiet"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by","has-window","has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
